articles.author: Ben Noll, Ellen Francis
articles.title: 40 people drown as France seeks relief from record heat - The Washington Post
articles.description: Hundreds of records fell as temperatures climbed to levels higher than nearly the rest of the planet. The heat wave will expand across Europe through the weekend.
articles.content: A record-breaking heat dome has scorched France, where officials and local reports have said at least 45 people have died amid the high temperatures, including 40 by drowning. Officials have said man… [+69 chars]
